title: Swap default mount propagation from private to rprivate
body:
This matches Docker behavior more closely and should resolve an issue we were seeing with /sys mounts

Partial fix for #1447

comments.body:
LGTM
While rprivate is not really needed for tmpfs mounts, it does not hurt anything.
bot, retest this please
LGTM, assuming the test flakes are brushed away.

:pushpin: Commit 3b8f971 has been approved by `rhatdan`
